step_rationale: Lysosomal protease; ECM degradation; fibrous-cap destabilization.
mechanism: Cathepsin B degrades collagen and elastin in the fibrous cap, promoting thinning and rupture in unstable plaques.

references.title: Cysteinyl cathepsins in cardiovascular diseases.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Proteins and proteomics

references.title: Extracellular matrix proteomics identifies molecular signature of symptomatic carotid plaques.
